steps.title: Find the required contrast
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between quintidi and decadi. The relevant notes say quintidi were named for animals, while decadi were named for agricultural tools.

steps.title: Reject one-sided choices
steps.content: A discusses only a quintidi named after an animal. C says the two day names existed but does not explain how they differed. D discusses only decadi and agricultural tools. The answer must contrast both categories. The answer is B.
